brief_title: Enzalutamide in First Line Androgen Deprivation Therapy for Metastatic Prostate Cancer
official_title: Randomised Phase 3 Trial of Enzalutamide in First Line Androgen Deprivation Therapy for Metastatic Prostate Cancer: ENZAMET
